directive.title: Dashboard performance budget assertion and instrumentation

auditor.summary: The build has critical issues that prevent it from passing. The most severe problem is the dependency on '@prisma/client' which is not installed in the project - this will cause build failures. Additionally, several files were created as new files when they should have been modifications to existing files (app/api/rfq/route.ts, app/dashboard/page.tsx), which could overwrite existing logic. Unnecessary files were created (DashboardStats.tsx, RFQTable.tsx, lib/auth.ts) that were not in the spec. Multiple acceptance criteria are not met due to missing unit tests. The code structure and logic for the performance instrumentation is otherwise sound, but the buildability issues and spec violations make this a FAIL verdict.

top_issues.description: Imports from '@prisma/client' which is NOT listed in package.json dependencies or devDependencies. This will cause a build failure.
